tour.welcomeBody: A read-first code IDE: read the code calmly, annotate it, let an agent do the edits. Here's the loop — about 30 seconds.
tour.readBody: Open files from the tree and move through the code. Mark files as read to keep your place across a long session.
tour.commentBody: Select lines and press {key} to leave a note or a task. Comments are an overlay — they never change your code.
tour.tasksBody: Every note and task collects here, with its state: open, in progress, done.
tour.reviewBody: Pick a scope and an objective; the agent plans a route through the changes for you to review file by file.
tour.resolveBody: Launch an agent in the terminal: it reads your open tasks and resolves them via the reado CLI. You review, the agent commits.
tour.customizeBody: Theme, code font and reading width — all in Settings, anytime.

app.tagline: A calm place to read code.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: The interface hit an unexpected error. You can retry, or reload the window.

welcome.step1: Read — open files and move through the code.
welcome.step2: Comment — select lines and leave a note or task.
welcome.step3: Resolve — run an agent; it answers your tasks via the reado CLI.

recents.title: Recent projects
recents.empty: No projects yet. Open a folder to start reading.
recents.openHint: Open any local folder — a git repository or not.

tree.readError: Couldn't read this folder — check permissions or that it still exists.

editor.empty: Select a file from the tree to start reading.
editor.saveError: Couldn't save — the file may be read-only or the disk full.

outline.noFile: Open a file to see its outline.

bookmarks.empty: No bookmarks yet. Click the gutter or use “Toggle bookmark”.

sync.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid Reado settings bundle (or it's from a newer version).
sync.summary: Import {settings} settings and {disabled} disabled extension(s)? This replaces matching preferences on this machine.

timeline.noFile: Open a file to see its history.

semantic.title: Semantic search
semantic.generating: Searching… the agent is finding matches in the terminal.
semantic.error: No matches yet. Make sure an agent is running in the terminal, then try again.

mcp.title: Reado MCP
mcp.enable: Enable Reado MCP for the agent
mcp.enabled: Wired Reado's MCP server for: {agents}. Restart the agent so it picks up your comments, tasks, reading progress, and bookmarks as context.
mcp.parseError: Your .mcp.json is not valid JSON — fix it first, then try again.

anywhere.title: Reado Anywhere
anywhere.open: Reado Anywhere — review from your phone
anywhere.tagline: Review from your phone. Scan a QR to pair over your local network — read the diff, leave comments, run the agent.
anywhere.privacyNote: No account, no cloud. Works on the same network, or anywhere over a VPN.
anywhere.primeTitle: macOS will ask for local network access
anywhere.primeBody: Reado serves this page over your local network so your phone can reach it. macOS will show its own prompt next — choose Allow. Nothing leaves your network.
anywhere.scanHint: Scan with your phone's camera on the same network (or VPN). You'll accept a certificate warning once.

prereview.empty: No suggestions. Run AI pre-review on your current changes.
prereview.error: The agent didn't respond — is it running in the terminal?

empty.title: Guided Pair Review
empty.body: The agent proposes a route, reviews file by file and drafts comments; you decide. Pick a focus and start — nothing is final until you approve it.

guided.planning: Planning the route — the agent is reading the change…
guided.noRoute: No route yet. Review a file or restart the planning pass.

action.reviewHint: Ask the agent to review this file and propose comments
action.againHint: Review again — a second-opinion pass that challenges the findings
action.challengeHint: Ask a second agent to challenge the findings on this file
action.respondHint: Ask the agent to reply to the comments already on this file

guided.noProposals: No open proposals. Review a file to gather some.
guided.reviewPromptHint: Describe what you want reviewed — the agent decides which files are relevant.
guided.reviewPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Review the auth flow in src/lib for race conditions and missing error handling

loop.hint: The agent has gone quiet — check the terminal and answer it.

forge.noAdapter: Host round-trip isn't available for {provider} yet — review locally.
forge.installHint: {cli} isn't installed — needed to open requests from this host.
forge.noNumber: No pull/merge request number — can't submit.
forge.pickNoForge: No forge detected for this repo — add a GitHub or GitLab remote to review pull requests.
forge.checkoutFailed: Couldn't open PR #{number} — check that gh/glab is set up and try again.
forge.checkoutAuth: Couldn't open PR #{number}: the forge CLI isn't signed in. Run `gh auth login` (or `glab auth login`).

tours.empty: No tours yet. Create one, or generate a tour with AI.

qa.title: Ask about selection
qa.placeholder: What do you want to know about this code?
qa.generating: Generating… the agent is answering in the terminal.
qa.empty: No anchored Q&A yet. Select code and use “Ask AI about selection”.

onboarding.title: Understand this repo
onboarding.generating: Generating… the agent is writing the overview in the terminal.
onboarding.stale: The repository moved since this overview was generated — Regenerate to refresh.

synopsis.title: Synopsis
synopsis.generating: Generating… the agent is writing the synopsis in the terminal.
synopsis.error: No synopsis yet. Make sure an agent is running in the terminal, then try Regenerate.
synopsis.stale: The file changed since this synopsis was generated — Regenerate to refresh.

activity.empty: No file changes yet this session.

hier.empty: Run “Show Call Hierarchy” on a symbol.
hier.unsupported: This file's language server doesn't provide hierarchies (or none is running).

diff.head: HEAD (uncommitted)
diff.noBase: Not present in the selected base.
diff.noChanges: No changes versus the selected base.

delta.review: Review changes since you last read this
delta.noBase: No last-read snapshot to compare against.
delta.noChanges: No changes since you last read this.

search.ripgrepMissing: Search needs ripgrep (rg), which isn't installed or on your PATH. Install it, then try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.completionSound: Play a sound when the agent finishes
settings.cliDone: Installed at {path}. If `reado` isn't found, add that folder to your PATH.
settings.cliHint: Links the bundled 'reado' CLI so AI agents can read and resolve your tasks from any project.
settings.logHint: Logs what the app does to a local file you can send us to debug an issue. Secrets and file contents are never written.

empty.firstComment: Select one or more lines, then press the comment shortcut to leave your first note.

comment.taskHint: Tasks are sent to the AI; notes are not.
comment.deleteConfirm: Delete this comment? This cannot be undone.
comment.orphan: Orphaned — the anchored code could not be found.

audit.title: Ask AI for an audit
audit.instructions: What should the AI look for?
audit.placeholder: e.g. correctness bugs, security issues, dead code… (leave empty for a general audit)
audit.hint: The AI writes its findings as comments anchored to the code, so you can read them inline.

comments.empty: No comments yet. Hover a line and click +, or select code and press the comment shortcut.

git.clean: No changes — the working tree is clean.
git.discardConfirm: Discard changes to {name}? This cannot be undone.
git.discardAllConfirm: Discard all working-tree changes (including untracked files)? This cannot be undone.
git.stashDropConfirm: Drop this stash? This cannot be undone.

window.openWhere: Open this folder in this window, or a new one?

specs.empty: No specs found — this isn't an OpenSpec/speckit project.

graph.title: Knowledge graph
graph.empty: Nothing to graph yet. Your comments, specs, and docs appear here as connected nodes once you add them.

orphans.reanchorHint: Re-anchoring “{label}” — select a line or range in the editor and confirm.

gitignore.title: Add .reado/ to .gitignore?
gitignore.body: Reado stores your comments under .reado/. By default they stay local and are not committed. You can version them later in Settings.

agent.notInstalled: {name} isn't installed. Install it to use Reado's AI features.
